degradations.message: Promotion planning is report-only; prefer --dry-run in automation.
causal promote-plan has sample size 0 with no observed baseline/outcome ledger; no causal effect is actionable.
Requested action `demote` is recorded as review input only; underpowered evidence cannot promote, demote, archive, or quarantine.

revalidation: Collect persisted exposure, baseline, outcome, and confounder evidence for `mem_confounded_001` before any causal estimate.
experimentProposals: Design an explicit experiment for `mem_confounded_001` and persist treatment, baseline, outcome, and confounder evidence before re-running causal promotion review.
reviewRecommendations: Route `mem_confounded_001` to evidence collection; no persisted causal chain supports promotion, demotion, or rerouting.
safetyGuards: Safety-critical warnings remain pinned and are never randomized away for evidence collection.
